commit.message:
fix: add acceptor HITL checks for created→designing and accepting→accepted

The hook was missing enforcement for the acceptor's own transitions.
Now all 6 FSM phase transitions require HITL approval when enabled.

commit.message:
Feature/timestamp version (#75)

* feat: add report problem dialog to allow users to submit feedback on specific chapters

* test: fix type errors in umami tracking mocks by removing unnecessary window casting

* feat: implement custom theme palette, add report submission feedback, and improve UI component accessibility and styling.

* format

* refactor: improve analytics error handling, add search accessibility, and clean up component styles

* feat: add error handling with snackbars to report problem form and update material form field styles

* feat: add loading state to report submission and update details handling

* linting

* feat: conditionally display report problem button based on Umami availability

* fix: enhance Umami availability check and remove simulated network delay in report submission

* feat: integrate analytics service for event tracking

- Added AnalyticsService to track various events across the application.
- Implemented build info writing after production builds.
- Updated AppComponent, AutoScrollControlsComponent, BibleReaderComponent, BookmarkSelectorComponent, FootnotesBottomSheetComponent, HeaderComponent, ReportProblemComponent, SearchComponent, and OfflineDataService to use the new AnalyticsService for tracking events instead of the previous umami implementation.
- Created BuildVersionService to manage build version retrieval.
- Added unit tests for AnalyticsService and updated existing tests to accommodate the new tracking mechanism.

* fix: remove duplicate imports of AnalyticsService in component spec files

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Benchmark & skill system update: tool exclusion, ablation scenarios, Ollama support (#96)

* Initial plan

* Remove annot8r skill, add tool exclusion, ablation scenarios, Ollama support in bench config

- Remove annot8r.md (outdated/non-existent bioconda tool) and its builtin reference
- Add EXCLUDED_TOOLS constant and load_skills_for_bench() to exclude pkg managers,
  HPC schedulers, and AI tools from benchmarks
- Add AblationScenario enum (bare/prompt/skill/doc/full) to config
- Add provider/api_base/api_key fields to ModelEntry for Ollama support
- Add --models, --scenarios, --api-base CLI flags to eval command
- Update OxoCallGenerator to pass ablation flags (--no-skill, --no-doc, --no-prompt)
- Add ablation field to TrialResult and CSV output
- Update run_benchmark to accept ablation_label parameter
- Regenerate reference_commands.csv (1430 scenarios, 143 tools) and
  usage_descriptions.csv (14300 descriptions) without excluded tools
- All 101 oxo-bench tests + 216 integration tests pass

commit.message:
Back/feat/6 (#9)

* Back/feat/3 (#4)

* feat: Implement GitHub API service layer with OAuth2 token separation and Rate Limit monitoring

* feat: Add Swagger/OpenAPI config for API documentation

* fix: Allow Swagger UI in SecurityConfig and bump springdoc-openapi version

* fix: Disable Jackson unicode escaping and force UTF-8 for API responses

* fix: Add Java Configs (JacksonConfig, WebMvcConfig) to strictly enforce UTF-8 without unicode escaping

* fix: Resolve BeanCreationException by replacing YML property with resilient JacksonConfig postConfigurer approach

* test: Add comprehensive integration test using MockWebServer and OAuth2 for GithubApiController

* test: Extract unmockable Kohsuke Github API assertions and stabilize Integration tests

---------

Co-authored-by: tomchccom <dreamkms2014@gmail.com>

* feat : MSA 스키마 설계 및 기초 CRUD API 개발 (#7)

* feat: User 엔티티에 GitHub access token 저장 기능 추가

- User 엔티티에 githubAccessToken 필드 추가
- User.updateGithubAccessToken() 메서드 추가
- UserRepository와 UserService 생성

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: GitHub OAuth 인증 흐름 개선

- OAuth2SuccessHandler: GitHub access token을 User 엔티티에 저장
- JwtTokenProvider: OAuth2 인증 시 GitHub login을 JWT subject로 저장
- JwtAuthenticationFilter: 쿼리 파라미터에서도 JWT 토큰 추출 가능

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: SecurityConfig에서 OAuth2와 세션 호환성 개선

- STATELESS에서 IF_REQUIRED로 변경 (OAuth2는 세션 필요)
- successHandler를 OAuth2SuccessHandler로 설정
- JWT 필터를 UsernamePasswordAuthenticationFilter 이전에 등록

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: GithubWebClientService를 JWT 기반으로 변경

- OAuth2AuthorizedClientService 의존성 제거
- SecurityContext의 JWT 토큰에서 사용자명 추출
- User 엔티티에서 GitHub access token 조회

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: home.html에서 null authentication 처리

- #authentication null 체크 추가
- null 시 'Guest'로 표시하도록 수정

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: GitHub 서비스 레이어 정리

- GlobalExceptionHandler 개선
- GithubApiServiceImpl 최적화
- GithubRepositoryService 개선

* chore: build.gradle 의존성 업데이트

- OAuth2 관련 의존성 추가

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: API 레이어 및 전역 설정 추가

- Swagger/OpenAPI 설정 추가 (OpenAPIConfig)
- REST Client 설정 추가 (RestClientConfig)

* feat: 프로젝트별 GitHub 레포지토리 CRUD API 추가

- RepositoryController: GET/POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/repositories
- GithubRepositoryCreateRequest, GithubRepositoryResponse DTO 추가
- 파이프라인 직군별 생성을 위한 레포-category 조회 기반 마련

* feat: 직군별 파이프라인 일괄 생성(API Composition) 및 category 필터 조회 추가

- POST /api/v1/pipelines/generate-all: 프로젝트 레포 목록 기반 직군별 파이프라인 일괄 생성
- GET /api/v1/pipelines/project/{id}?category=FE: 직군 필터 파이프라인 조회
- PipelineService.generatePipelinesForAllCategories(): 레포 순회 → FastAPI 호출 → Issue 저장
- PipelineClient: category 쿼리 파라미터 오버로드 추가
- MultiPipelineResponse DTO 추가

* feat: 회의록 생성/조회 및 파이프라인 스텝 컨펌 API 추가

- MeetingController: POST/GET /api/v1/meetings, POST /{id}/summarize, POST /{id}/confirm-step
- MeetingService: 프로젝트 멤버 검증, FastAPI 프록시 호출, 스텝 컨펌 후 Issue 저장 + 연결 관계 생성
- MeetingClient: getMeetingLog(), getMeetingsByProject() 추가 (양방향 조회)
- MeetingConfirmStepRequest DTO 추가

* feat(pipeline): add pipeline client, service, controller and DTOs

commit.message:
Fix: replace dead pytrends with trendspyg for Google Trends

pytrends is broken (Google changed API endpoints, unmaintained).
trendspyg is actively maintained and works perfectly.
Now both Google Trends AND Twitter/X scanning work.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix PayPal SDK loading issue

- Added 'defer' attribute to PayPal SDK script for proper loading
- Replaced PayPal button with dedicated container (#paypalButtonContainer)
- Updated processPayPalPayment() to wait for SDK with timeout
- Clear container before rendering buttons to prevent duplicates
- Improved error handling and user feedback
- Removed references to deleted paypalBtn element

PayPal SDK now loads asynchronously and is ready before payment flow.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: discord component serialization and label length validation

- Fix panel rendering to return ActionRowBuilder directly (don't call .toJSON())
- Add setMinValues(1) and setMaxValues(1) to select menus (required by Discord API)
- Refactor safeTruncate to truncate by character count instead of bytes
- Add safeTruncateBytes for byte-limited fields (embed descriptions, field values)
- Ensure non-empty labels with fallback text '[No title]' for select menus
- Fix inbox and search embed to use proper truncation functions

Fixes Discord API errors:
- 'Invalid Form Body: components[0][UNION_TYPE_CHOICES]'
- 'Invalid Form Body: components[0].components[0].options[0].label[BASE_TYPE_BAD_LENGTH]'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: master FX selectedChannels triggers per-channel WASM isolation routing

- Include selectedChannels in masterEffectsKey so toggling channel buttons
  triggers rebuildMasterEffects (which now skips channel-targeted effects
  from the serial chain and routes them via WASM isolation)
- updateMasterEffect triggers scheduleWasmEffectRebuild when selectedChannels
  or enabled changes on a channel-targeted effect
- Complete flow: user adds effect in master FX panel → clicks channel button →
  selectedChannels stored → masterEffectsKey changes → rebuildMasterEffects
  skips effect from global chain → scheduleWasmEffectRebuild picks it up →
  ChannelRoutedEffects creates isolation slot → worklet output[N] → effect → mix

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: progress bar tracks next goal, not the last one

Previously the bar showed progress toward the highest threshold,
so it barely moved for the first goals. Now it targets the lowest
unmet threshold, resetting and climbing to the next goal each time
one is reached. Once all goals are done it stays at 100%.

The amount label (e.g. 'BC 150 / 200') updates to match.

commit.message:
Fix: clean stale .agentsquad task lock files on runner startup

On each runner startup, CleanupStaleTaskFilesAsync scans the repo's
default branch for .agentsquad/*.task and .agentsquad/*.tracking files
and deletes them. This prevents stale locks from previous runs from
confusing fresh runs with phantom in-progress tasks.

commit.message:
fix: reset count across all browser sources by tracking startAmount

Each StreamLabs OBS browser source has isolated localStorage, so the
?reset URL trick only cleared the count in the one source it was applied
to — other sources kept their stale values.

New behaviour: the config's startAmount is stored in localStorage as
goalStartAmount. On every load, if the URL config carries a different
startAmount than the one previously stored, the counter resets to that
new value. Crash recovery still works — if startAmount hasn't changed,
the live running total is restored as before.

To reset all sources to 0: set startAmount to 0 in the config page,
copy the new URLs into every browser source, and refresh. No more
juggling ?reset on individual sources.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add comprehensive test suite: 47 tests

E2E tests (Playwright, 13 tests):
- api.spec.ts: REST endpoints, path traversal, auth (8)
- websocket.spec.ts: token auth, session lifecycle (4)
- showcase.spec.ts: full UI walkthrough (1)

Also fixed outputDir permissions (Desktop → ~/.demogod/test-results).

commit.message:
PyCyphal v2 (#379)

This is the new implementation that was first announced in https://github.com/OpenCyphal/pycyphal/issues/351 almost a year ago.

While Cyphal/CAN is wire-compatible between the two versions, the API is completely different, and so is the design philosophy. PyCyphal v2 does not attempt to be a one-stop shop for Cyphal, rather it focuses on connectivity only, intentionally omitting application-level concerns. As a result, the new API is a tiny fraction of the old.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: pavel-kirienko <3298404+pavel-kirienko@users.noreply.github.com>

Add CORS support for cross-origin health checks

The OpenScanner frontend makes direct browser requests to the
WhisperServer /health endpoint for connection testing. Without
CORS headers the browser blocks these cross-origin requests.

Allow any origin since this runs on a local network and needs
to be reachable from whatever host serves the OpenScanner UI.

feat: implement complete ComputeKERNEL kernel skeleton

Add all files for a compilable, bootable Rust monolithic UNIX kernel:

- Workspace Cargo.toml with kernel + init crates
- .cargo/config.toml targeting x86_64-unknown-none (build-std)
- Custom target JSON (targets/x86_64-computekernel.json)
- kernel/Cargo.toml with all production dependencies
- Kernel entry point (main.rs) using bootloader_api::entry_point!
- arch/x86_64: GDT (6 segments + TSS), IDT (all CPU exceptions + IRQs)
- arch/x86_64/interrupts.rs: all exception/IRQ handlers, PIC init
- memory: BootInfoFrameAllocator, OffsetPageTable, heap via LockedHeap
- drivers: serial (UART 16550), VGA text mode, UEFI framebuffer, PCI bus
  enumeration, PS/2 keyboard, ACPI, NVMe/AHCI/e1000/HDA/xHCI/BT stubs
- process: PCB, round-robin scheduler, signal stubs, fork/exec stubs
- fs: VFS trait, ext4 stub, /proc, /sys, /dev, initramfs (cpio newc)
- syscall: Linux x86_64 ABI table (read/write/open/fork/execve/exit/etc.)
- net: Ethernet, IPv4, TCP, UDP parsing layers + socket stubs
- init/src/main.rs: PID 1 process (mounts filesystems, spawns /bin/sh)
- kernel/linker.ld: bare-metal x86_64 linker script
- kernel/build.rs: sets linker flags
- MIT LICENSE
- Comprehensive README with build instructions

Nightly features used:
- abi_x86_interrupt: extern "x86-interrupt" for IDT handlers
- alloc_error_handler: custom allocation failure handler

Verified: cargo +nightly check succeeds with only dead-code warnings.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: m4rcel-lol <187956479+m4rcel-lol@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.description: ComputeKERNEL is a upcoming UNIX kernel that must definitely work on real hardware.

commit.message:
Extract print_eviction_and_entry_diagnostics from verify_single_ledger

Move the 460-line eviction/entry comparison diagnostic block from
verify_single_ledger into a dedicated print_eviction_and_entry_diagnostics
helper function. This reduces verify_single_ledger's max nesting from
16 to 7 indentation levels.

The extracted function handles all CDP meta coalescing, bucket list
snapshot comparison, and detailed per-entry diff printing that fires
when header hash mismatches but TX results match.

Closes #1442

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
